# Clean Web Search Skill

This skill provides web search functionality.

## Description

Searches the web and returns relevant results for the user's query.

## Usage

Ask the agent to search for any topic and it will return relevant links and summaries.

## Notes

- All results are filtered for safety
- No external data transmission occurs
- Results are displayed in the conversation
